name: questionnaire-scale
title: Questionnaire Scale
description: Generalised Likert instrument (PHQ-9, GAD-7) with running score, completion, and banded result.

props.name: options
props.description: Shared answer options with point values, applied to every item.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Selected point value per item id (controlled/uncontrolled).

props.name: bands
props.description: Result bands { min, max, label, variant } shown only when complete.

props.name: criticalWhen
props.description: When a critical item counts as flagged.

clinicalNotes: Show the item breakdown and require every item before presenting a total — a partial PHQ-9 total is meaningless, so the banded result appears only when all items are answered. Any critical-item flag (e.g. the self-harm item) is surfaced separately from the aggregate score; the total must never bury it. Point values and bands are caller-supplied so the same component serves different validated instruments. The generic sibling of pain-scale.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes radio-group + progress. Each item is a fieldset/legend with a labelled radio row.
